div.head: Getting started
div.p: This is a paragraph. Select a word and try a toolbar button — bold, italic, or a link.

item.p: Press Tab here to nest this item …
… and Shift-Tab to move it back out
To make this a bullet list, select the list in the breadcrumbs above, then change the rend attribute

div.p: Ada Lovelace once worked in London — entity names can be linked to external authority databases.

div.head: A nested section
div.p: A new division always becomes a child of the division you're currently in. To move it up, use the breadcrumbs below the toolbar to select the entire division, then click the Move Up toolbar button.
